expected_effect: Fix narrative data integrity issues: 3 intent mismatches, 1 chronological disorder, 1 signal pollution, 1 scope mismatch, 1 ghost gene reference, 1 truncated result
rationale: Narrative tail entries (03-24~03-25) contain 7 data integrity issues: INNOVATE labels on optimize-gene entries, out-of-order timestamps, raw Chinese in signals, unregistered gene reference, and scope header/result mismatch. These cause protocol_drift signal and inject noise into evolution context.

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON
Prefer reusing existing Gene/Capsule; only create if no match exists
Refactor prompt assembly to embed assets (genes, capsules, parent event)
Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Append cycle record to MEMORY.md history table (never overwrite existing entries)
Validate by running node index.js run and ensuring no runtime errors
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

summary: Fixed 7 narrative data integrity issues across 3 files: 3 intent corrections (INNOVATE→OPTIMIZE on optimize-gene entries), 1 chronological reorder (03-24 before 03-25), 1 signal decontamination (raw Chinese→append_only_history), 1 scope fix (6/230→9/178), 1 ghost gene cataloged (gene_auto_5eb089f2→retired_genes), 1 truncated result completed
